items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian that automatically collapses all child folders when you collapse a parent folder. This helps keep your file explorer organized and clutter-free.
items.title: DarioCasciato/obsidian-auto-folder-collapse: A plugin for Obsidian that automatically collapses all child folders when you collapse a parent folder. This helps keep your file explorer organized and clutter-free.
